member.name: M:GTA.NaturalMotion.SetMuscleStiffnessHelper.#ctor(GTA.Ped)
member.summary:
Creates a new Instance of the SetMuscleStiffnessHelper for sending a SetMuscle stiffness
to a given
.
member.param:
The
to send the SetMuscle stiffness
to.
member.remarks: Use this message to manually set the muscle stiffness values -before using Active Pose to drive to an animated pose, for example.
